### Description

Explain what this PR changes and why.

### Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build` succeeds for affected projects
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes for affected test projects (see [README](https://github.com/antoinebou12/Serilog.Sinks.SentrySDK/blob/main/README.md#build-run-tests-and-coverage-local-development))
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes or bug fixes
- [ ] README or XML docs updated if users need new configuration or API notes
- [ ] Formatting / style consistent with the repository (e.g. `dotnet format` when applicable)

Fixes #(issue number)
